features.name: width mismatch in chained wire assignments
features.description: Code should include a chain of procedural assignments between temporary wires where adjacent assignments have swapped bit widths causing 1-bit and 32-bit signals to be incorrectly interconnected

features.name: inout type with invalid element causes assertion failure
features.description: Code should include an inout (bidirectional port) declaration with an invalid or incompatible element type that triggers an assertion failure during type construction

features.name: auto-generated temporary wire with wrong width inference
features.description: Code should include auto-generated temporary wires (_T_*) whose widths are incorrectly inferred causing downstream width mismatches when assigned
